name: All AI Tool List Agent
description: AI agent for discovering, searching, and comparing AI tools in the world's largest AI tools directory

skills.name: Search AI Tools
skills.description: Search for AI tools by name, category, use case, or pricing model

skills.name: Browse Categories
skills.description: Browse and explore AI tools organized by category, industry, and use case

skills.name: Compare AI Tools
skills.description: Compare multiple AI tools side by side including features, pricing, and ratings

skills.name: Find Alternatives
skills.description: Find alternative AI tools to any given tool
